description: As a Senior Systems Analyst preparing API documentation, add a new slide titled 'API Response Structure' to the end of the presentation located at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/api_docs_v2.odp. Copy the JSON content from /home/ga/Desktop/json_snippet.txt into a text box on this new slide. Format the text box as a code block using a monospace font, a light gray background (#EEEEEE), and a solid black border. Save the updated presentation.
